hero.title: Best Sri Lankan Gem Stones
hero.subtitle: Rare Ceylon sapphires, rubies and collector stones — hand-selected and delivered direct from the legendary mines of Rathnapura.
hero.description: Discover the finest Sri Lankan gem stones directly from the mines of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka's legendary gem capital.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Kamara Selections was founded by two friends: Ralph from Switzerland and Kamal from Sri Lanka. Friends for over 44 years, they built this gem business with mining partners in Rathnapura, known as the City of Gems. Their long-standing partnership and hands-on expertise help us deliver some of the best Sri Lankan gemstones with trusted sourcing.
about.heritageDesc: Built by two friends with 40+ years of trust
about.qualityDesc: Hand-selected gems from our own mines

gemstones.title: Treasures of the Island of Gems
gemstones.subtitle: For over 2,000 years Sri Lanka has produced the world's finest coloured stones. Every gem below is hand-selected from our Rathnapura mining partners.
gemstones.ctaText: Looking for a specific stone, cut or carat weight? Our team can source it directly from the mine.

sapphire.name: Ceylon Blue Sapphire
sapphire.description: The stone that made Ceylon famous. Prized worldwide for its vivid cornflower-blue hue, glass-like clarity and brilliant lustre — the benchmark against which all blue sapphires are judged.

yellowSapphire.name: Yellow Sapphire
yellowSapphire.description: Known locally as Pushparaga, this golden-to-canary sapphire radiates warmth and light. A durable, highly sought-after stone treasured by collectors and in astrological jewellery alike.

violetSapphire.name: Violet Sapphire
violetSapphire.description: An uncommon and captivating member of the corundum family, glowing in soft purple to deep violet tones. A distinctive Ceylon rarity for the discerning collector.

ruby.name: Ceylon Ruby
ruby.description: Rare and passionate, Sri Lankan rubies range from delicate pink to intense red. Sharing the corundum lineage of sapphire, they offer exceptional hardness and fire.

catseye.name: Cat's Eye Chrysoberyl
catseye.description: A phenomenal gem displaying a sharp, silvery band of light that glides across the surface like a cat's eye. Sri Lanka produces some of the finest honey-toned specimens on earth.

alexandrite.name: Alexandrite
alexandrite.description: One of nature's true wonders — emerald green by daylight, raspberry red under lamplight. Ceylon alexandrite is among the rarest and most valuable of all gemstones.

moonstone.name: Blue Moonstone
moonstone.description: Sri Lanka is the source of the world's finest moonstone. A milky body floats a soft, blue-white sheen that seems to glow from within — serene, luminous and unmistakable.

topaz.name: Imperial Topaz
topaz.description: A brilliant, warm golden stone with outstanding transparency and sparkle. Its rich amber-to-honey glow makes it a favourite for statement jewellery.

media.title: See the journey of our gemstones
media.subtitle: From riverbed gravel to precision faceting, experience the process through short clips and photos.

contact.description: Interested in our gemstones? Contact us to discuss your requirements.

contact.sriLankaPhoneNotice: This Sri Lankan number works only while Ralph is in Sri Lanka. When he is outside Sri Lanka, please contact him on WhatsApp.

footer.blurb: Trusted sourcing directly from Rathnapura mines with full transparency, consistency, and concierge-level service.
